events.description: Reads existing clean ban lines and preserves external changes.
events.does_not_prove: A player caused any server warning.

events.description: A Saved-folder scan completed with readable file counts.
Visible object, item, class, map, and script strings were counted.
A new visible class string was registered as informational by default.

events.does_not_prove: A specific player created the objects.

events.description: A log-observable account identity or name was seen.
A log-observable player join was seen.
A log-observable player leave was seen.
UpdateActorToWorldSave world actor save-touch context was observed.
events.does_not_prove: Player action, object ownership, damage, duplication, or container use.

events.description: Crash, fatal, restart, shutdown, exit, or server failure text was observed.
events.does_not_prove: Any one account caused the failure.

events.description: A configured high-risk class string was visible.
Multiple accounts were correlated around warning or failure windows.
events.does_not_prove: Every account in the case is ban eligible.

events.description: An account was linked to a raid case for review.
A clean BannedPlayer=<ID> line was written after account-specific thresholds were met.
A restart marker was written; the mod does not restart the server process directly.
